      Throws:
      UnexpectedErrorFault_Exception

      @RequestWrapper(localName="describeQuickActionsForRecordType", targetNamespace="urn:partner.soap.sforce.com", className="org.solenopsis.soap.partner.DescribeQuickActionsForRecordType") @ResponseWrapper(localName="describeQuickActionsForRecordTypeResponse", targetNamespace="urn:partner.soap.sforce.com", className="org.solenopsis.soap.partner.DescribeQuickActionsForRecordTypeResponse") List<DescribeQuickActionResult> describeQuickActionsForRecordType(List<String> quickActions, String recordTypeId)
